_comment: Propagation map: L0 (workspace root) → L1 (templates/common/). Edit this file to add/remove sync domains.

scripts.note: L0-only scripts excluded — they reference workspace-level files not available in L2 projects

scripts-helpers.note: L0-only helper exclusion is handled by SCRIPTS.md layer column — publish-to-template.ts reads layer before copying

scripts-lib.note: All lib/ files are currently L0-only per SCRIPTS.md — none will be copied until a file gets layer: common

gemini-settings.description: Antigravity CLI settings file — shared items only (mcpServers, hooks.SessionStart, hooks.PostToolUse). Claude-only items excluded per platform_settings.claude_only in common-contract.json.
gemini-settings.note: Never include: CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS, teammateMode, TeammateIdle, TaskCreated, TaskCompleted, permissions — all claude_only per common-contract.json platform_settings
